changelog: Fixed the in-app updater package format so real file changes are applied correctly during updates
Added compatibility handling for flat update packages so malformed archives no longer silently update only the version number
Fixed notifications pages and dashboard rendering for comment notifications on installs that store comments in the comments table
Unified the full notifications page with the notifications API so badge, bell dropdown, and page use the same grouped data source
Fixed quick due date editing in the tickets list so changes persist after saving existing deadlines
Fixed multiple attachment uploads so normal multi-file submits work and oversized requests no longer fall back to a misleading security check error
